overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through rural grasslands at dusk. The character travels along a lakeside trail as the sun sets, casting long shadows and warm golden light across the landscape, with dramatic clouds filling the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail along lakeshore at sunset

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with two swords strapped to his back, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with visible wheel ruts and patches of grass
calm body of water reflecting the sunset colors
rolling green hills with tall grass and wildflowers
sparse deciduous trees along the distant shoreline
dark storm clouds mixed with golden sunset light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide-open grassland trail at dusk, with Geralt walking away from the camera along a dirt path. To the left, a calm lake reflects the warm sunset colors while rolling green hills rise on the right. The sky is filled with dramatic clouds illuminated by the setting sun, casting long shadows across the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with dense trees on right side

events.description: flock of birds suddenly takes flight from the ground ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the narrowing path as birds scatter from the trail ahead

notable_agents.action: flock of birds taking flight from the ground and flying into the sky

entered.detail: thick cluster of pine and deciduous trees creating a dark wall on the right side of the path
exposed rock face and boulders among the trees on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The path enters a more enclosed area with dense forest pressing in on the right side, creating darker, diffused lighting. The lake remains visible in the distance to the left while the terrain becomes rockier. At approximately 28 seconds, a flock of birds suddenly takes flight from the path ahead, scattering into the air as Geralt continues walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow trail with distant mountain views

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through open grassland with wide views of the surrounding landscape and distant mountains

entered.detail: expansive grassy field opening up to reveal distant mountain silhouettes

segments.scene_description: The trail emerges from the forested section into wide-open meadows, revealing expansive views of the surrounding landscape. The lake returns to clearer view on the left while distant mountains become visible on the horizon. The path becomes slightly rocky in sections as it continues through the grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside trail curving along the water's edge

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the winding lakeside path as the trail curves gently to follow the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the lakeside trail as it curves gently along the water's edge. The lake becomes prominent and close on the left side, reflecting the darkening sky. The path continues through mixed grassland and scattered trees as the terrain gradually slopes toward the shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open lakeside grassland that gradually transitions into a more enclosed, forested terrain. It begins with Geralt walking away from the camera along a dirt path, flanked by a calm lake reflecting the sunset on the left and rolling green hills on the right under a dramatic, cloud-filled sky. As the character progresses, the wide-open landscape shifts into a narrower corridor where dense forest presses in from the right, causing the warm golden light to become darker and more diffused. The terrain becomes increasingly rocky while the lake recedes into the distance, before a flock of birds suddenly takes flight from the path ahead and scatters into the air.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a trail emerges from a forested area into expansive, open meadows that eventually curve along a lakeside shoreline. It begins by breaking through the tree line to reveal wide views of the surrounding landscape, where the lake reappears on the left and distant mountains materialize on the horizon. As the camera advances, the dirt path becomes slightly rocky while cutting through the vast grassland. The scene then shifts as the trail gently curves, bringing the water's edge closer and more prominent on the left to reflect the darkening sky. Finally, the terrain gradually slopes toward the shoreline, moving through a mix of grass and scattered trees as the path follows the contour of the lake.
